name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M13992 White/Color】Takashi Murakami Collaboration Series. This Zippy coin wallet is made of Monogram canvas and is practical, featuring a spacious compartment, a zip coin pocket, and multiple credit card slots. Named for its secure wrap-around zip, it features a grained leather lining. Fully functional, it can also be used as a clutch. 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
